game.title: Harvest Scream
game.short_description: Harvest by day and survive the nightfall. In this 1 to 5 player co op horror you defend your farm with plushie alarms and light systems. Locate the Monster Nest Portal and use your shovel to crush the Heart of the darkness before your sanity breaks. Grab your friends and endure the harvest together!
game.long_description:
THE NIGHTFALL IS COMING. PROTECT YOUR INHERITANCE.

Harvest Scream is a multiplayer farming horror game for 1 to 5 players. You have returned to the deep woods to reclaim the old shack where your family once lived. While you work the land, something moves between the trees. When the sun sets, the forest echoes with the screams of monsters emerging from another world.

DAYTIME: PREPARE FOR THE ATTACK
The mornings are quiet, but peace is a finite resource. Use the daylight to secure your perimeter before the forest changes.
Farming and Fishing: Harvest crops from your fields and catch fish from the lake to earn the resources needed for your survival.
Upgrade Your Tools: Buy reinforced Shovels for better efficiency and high-powered Flashlights to stun the creatures lurking in the brush.
Fortify the Shack: This old cabin is your only sanctuary. Repair the generator and set up enchanted plushie alarms at every entrance.

NIGHTTIME: DEFEND YOUR HOME
When darkness falls, the shack becomes your fortress. If the power fails, the protection fades.
The Screaming Plushies: These are not toys. They emit haunting screams when monsters approach from the woods. Keep them repaired or lose your early warning.
The Surveillance Hub: Use the shack’s old computer to monitor your fields and track movements in the treeline.
Maintain the Power: The generator is your heartbeat. Keep it running to prevent monsters from forcing their way inside.

CLOSE THE PORTAL: PURIFY THE HEART
Survival is not enough. To stop the creatures that drove your family away, you must find and enter the portals hidden in the dark.
Track the Entrance: Use specialized detectors to track the energy radiating from the woods.
The Raid: Once inside the portal, you must use your tools to clear the Monster Nest Heart. Stop the source of the monsters to reclaim the woods.
Evolution of the Hunt: The Hearts grow stronger with every victory. Upgrading to a Master Shovel will allow you to complete your mission much faster.

CO-OP COORDINATION
Join forces with friends or find survivors through the Server Browser. Survival depends on how you manage your tasks:
Monitor and Maintain: Keep an eye on the computer for movement and ensure the generator and plushies stay functional.
Collective Defense: Work together to guard the shack or venture into the woods as a team to locate and clear the portals.
THE FINAL BLOOM
Purify every Nest to find the fabled Golden Seed. Plant it in the center of your clearing and protect its light to break the hold over the woods once and for all. Choose to leave the forest behind as a survivor or stay to tend your farm in a land that is finally quiet.
